title: vulpia longiseta var. hybrida
intro: Vulpia longiseta var. hybrida, also known as Vulpia, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which aid in treating various health conditions. The plant is known to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Vulpia is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be administered orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
